role_scope: One bounded correction-first pass for A1_JARGONED. Do not materialize the owner graph until the queue-selected family slice, the handoff family slice, and live packet-backed Rosetta fuel align.
operator_steps: Reload required boot surfaces before touching owner outputs.
Treat the live refinery graph as authoritative unless the packet explicitly names a more local owner surface.
Write only the declared owner outputs for this layer pass.
Run the declared audit skill(s) before claiming completion.
Fail closed if the pass would require inventing missing bridge doctrine or silently promoting a projection artifact to authority.
prompt_to_send: Run one bounded A1_JARGONED nested-graph build pass using the aligned DUAL_STACKED_ENGINE family scope. Materialize only packet-backed Rosetta nodes now available and preserve blocked Weyl-engine labels as explicit scope residue.
stop_rule: Stop after one bounded A1 jargoned/rosetta graph materialization pass.
